question_text: Which of the following would increase the strength of an electromagnet?

options.label: A
options.text: Increasing the number of coils of wire wrapped around the iron core

options.label: B
options.text: Removing the iron core and using an aluminium core instead

options.label: C
options.text: Decreasing the electric current flowing through the wire

options.label: D
options.text: Making the wire thinner to increase resistance

explanation: The strength of an electromagnet depends on the number of coils and the amount of current flowing through them. More coils create a stronger magnetic field, and a larger current also makes the electromagnet stronger.
